Red River College Civil Engineering Diploma grad (structural focus); prior at KGS Group (Winnipeg structural eng consultancy). Trades-household upbringing — the painter-training and craftsmanship narrative will land. Single-owner shop = he is the entire estimating department.

Customer reviews specifically cite Jason coming to the site personally to estimate. They have in-house painting capability — pitch as overflow / specialty / large commercial scale. COR-certified — safety alignment with Ashrah's training pitch.

Ledcor Winnipeg has an active Senior Estimator ICI Construction posting — monitor and send a hello as soon as a hire is announced on LinkedIn.
PCL Winnipeg has multiple Estimator and Senior Estimator postings — team is growing, new hires will need new sub relationships fast.
